Package DSA.Graphs.MatrixGraph

Class AdjacencyVect

  • java.lang.Object
    • DSA.Graphs.MatrixGraph.AdjacencyVect
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.Iterable<java.lang.Integer>, java.util.Collection<java.lang.Integer>
    public class AdjacencyVect
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.util.Collection<java.lang.Integer>
    AdjacencyVect represents a vector in an adjacency matrix for graph representation. Implements Collection interface to store boolean values for vertex adjacency. Only iterates over vertices that are adjacent (true values). Time Complexity: Most operations O(1), iteration O(n) Space Complexity: O(n) where n is the number of vertices

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      AdjacencyVect​(int size)
      Constructor creates adjacency vector with specified size.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      boolean add​(java.lang.Integer e)
      Adds vertex to adjacency vector (sets adjacency to true).
      boolean addAll​(java.util.Collection<? extends java.lang.Integer> c)
      Adds all vertices in the collection to adjacency vector.
      void clear()
      Removes all adjacencies (sets all to false).
      boolean contains​(java.lang.Object o)
      Checks if the specified vertex is adjacent.
      boolean containsAll​(java.util.Collection<?> c)
      Checks if all vertices in the collection are adjacent.
      boolean isEmpty()
      Checks if the adjacency vector is empty (no adjacent vertices).
      java.util.Iterator<java.lang.Integer> iterator()
      Returns iterator that only iterates over adjacent vertices (true values).
      boolean remove​(java.lang.Object o)
      Removes vertex from adjacency vector (sets adjacency to false).
      boolean removeAll​(java.util.Collection<?> c)
      Removes all vertices in the collection from adjacency vector.
      boolean retainAll​(java.util.Collection<?> c)
      Retains only vertices that are in the specified collection.
      int size()
      Returns the number of adjacent vertices (true values).
      java.lang.Object[] toArray()
      Converts collection to array of adjacent vertex IDs.
      <T> T[] toArray​(T[] a)
      Converts collection to typed array of adjacent vertex IDs.

        forEach

    • Constructor Detail

      • AdjacencyVect

        public AdjacencyVect​(int size)
        Constructor creates adjacency vector with specified size. All adjacencies are initially false. Time Complexity: O(n) Space Complexity: O(n)
        Parameters:
        size - Number of vertices in the graph

    • Method Detail

      • size

        public int size()
        Returns the number of adjacent vertices (true values). Time Complexity: O(1) Space Complexity: O(1)
        Specified by:
        size in interface java.util.Collection<java.lang.Integer>
        Returns:
        Number of adjacent vertices

      • isEmpty

        public boolean isEmpty()
        Checks if the adjacency vector is empty (no adjacent vertices). Time Complexity: O(1) Space Complexity: O(1)
        Specified by:
        isEmpty in interface java.util.Collection<java.lang.Integer>
        Returns:
        true if no adjacent vertices, false otherwise

      • contains

        public boolean contains​(java.lang.Object o)
        Checks if the specified vertex is adjacent. Time Complexity: O(1) Space Complexity: O(1)
        Specified by:
        contains in interface java.util.Collection<java.lang.Integer>
        Parameters:
        o - Object to check (should be Integer vertex ID)
        Returns:
        true if vertex is adjacent, false otherwise

      • iterator

        public java.util.Iterator<java.lang.Integer> iterator()
        Returns iterator that only iterates over adjacent vertices (true values). Time Complexity: O(1) for creation, O(n) for full iteration Space Complexity: O(1)
        Specified by:
        iterator in interface java.util.Collection<java.lang.Integer>
        Specified by:
        iterator in interface java.lang.Iterable<java.lang.Integer>
        Returns:
        Iterator over adjacent vertices

      • toArray

        public java.lang.Object[] toArray()
        Converts collection to array of adjacent vertex IDs. Time Complexity: O(n) Space Complexity: O(k) where k is number of adjacent vertices
        Specified by:
        toArray in interface java.util.Collection<java.lang.Integer>
        Returns:
        Array containing adjacent vertex IDs

      • toArray

        public <T> T[] toArray​(T[] a)
        Converts collection to typed array of adjacent vertex IDs. Time Complexity: O(n) Space Complexity: O(k) where k is number of adjacent vertices
        Specified by:
        toArray in interface java.util.Collection<java.lang.Integer>
        Type Parameters:
        T - Array element type
        Parameters:
        a - Array to store elements
        Returns:
        Array containing adjacent vertex IDs

      • add

        public boolean add​(java.lang.Integer e)
        Adds vertex to adjacency vector (sets adjacency to true). Time Complexity: O(1) Space Complexity: O(1)
        Specified by:
        add in interface java.util.Collection<java.lang.Integer>
        Parameters:
        e - Vertex ID to add
        Returns:
        true if vertex was added, false if already present

      • remove

        public boolean remove​(java.lang.Object o)
        Removes vertex from adjacency vector (sets adjacency to false). Time Complexity: O(1) Space Complexity: O(1)
        Specified by:
        remove in interface java.util.Collection<java.lang.Integer>
        Parameters:
        o - Vertex ID to remove
        Returns:
        true if vertex was removed, false if not present

      • containsAll

        public boolean containsAll​(java.util.Collection<?> c)
        Checks if all vertices in the collection are adjacent. Time Complexity: O(k) where k is size of collection c Space Complexity: O(1)
        Specified by:
        containsAll in interface java.util.Collection<java.lang.Integer>
        Parameters:
        c - Collection of vertices to check
        Returns:
        true if all vertices are adjacent, false otherwise

      • addAll

        public boolean addAll​(java.util.Collection<? extends java.lang.Integer> c)
        Adds all vertices in the collection to adjacency vector. Time Complexity: O(k) where k is size of collection c Space Complexity: O(1)
        Specified by:
        addAll in interface java.util.Collection<java.lang.Integer>
        Parameters:
        c - Collection of vertices to add
        Returns:
        true if any vertex was added, false otherwise

      • removeAll

        public boolean removeAll​(java.util.Collection<?> c)
        Removes all vertices in the collection from adjacency vector. Time Complexity: O(k) where k is size of collection c Space Complexity: O(1)
        Specified by:
        removeAll in interface java.util.Collection<java.lang.Integer>
        Parameters:
        c - Collection of vertices to remove
        Returns:
        true if any vertex was removed, false otherwise

      • retainAll

        public boolean retainAll​(java.util.Collection<?> c)
        Retains only vertices that are in the specified collection. Time Complexity: O(n + k) where n is graph size, k is collection size Space Complexity: O(1)
        Specified by:
        retainAll in interface java.util.Collection<java.lang.Integer>
        Parameters:
        c - Collection of vertices to retain
        Returns:
        true if adjacency vector was modified, false otherwise

      • clear

        public void clear()
        Removes all adjacencies (sets all to false). Time Complexity: O(n) Space Complexity: O(1)
        Specified by:
        clear in interface java.util.Collection<java.lang.Integer>
